question.question_text: What will the EUR/USD exchange rate be on 2026-03-27 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day ahead forecast, the best point estimate is the current rate (random walk assumption). EUR/USD typical daily volatility is approximately 0.5-0.6% annualized to daily gives roughly 0.003-0.004 per day. Using ~0.0035 as one standard deviation for daily moves: 50% CI covers ~0.67 sigma each side (~0.0023), 80% CI covers ~1.28 sigma (~0.0045), 90% CI covers ~1.645 sigma (~0.0058). These intervals are centered on the current rate of 1.1539.
